displayTitle: Tales From The Occlusion Zone: The Will To Fight
synopsis: News, exclusive fiction, and more! THE FORCE OF SPORT! Former wrestler Arda Ocal explores the ties between Star Wars and the world of sports. COMBAT READY OR CLANKERS? Historian Dr. Chris Kempshall discovers just how effective the Trade Federation's battle droids really were. EXCLUSIVE STAR WARS: THE HIGH REPUBLIC FICTION: The epic finale of Tales from the Occlusion Zone!
title: Tales From The Occlusion Zone: The Will To Fight
